prompt: Setup will plant a Contacts entry named 'KinBench Apple 367' with email kinbench-apple@example.com. Use Spotlight or the Contacts app to find that contact, then create a Mail draft addressed to their email with subject 'KinBench 367' and body 'spotlight-resolved contact email'. Save as draft. Fast path: cerebellum 'multi contact_to_mail "KinBench Apple 367" "KinBench 367" "spotlight-resolved contact email"'.
